children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="15" height="11" viewBox="0 0 15 11" fill="none"><rect x="0" y="5" width="2.5" height="6" rx="1" fill="#1C1007" opacity="0.35"/><rect x="4" y="3" width="2.5" height="8" rx="1" fill="#1C1007" opacity="0.6"/><rect x="8" y="1" width="2.5" height="10" rx="1" fill="#1C1007" opacity="0.85"/><rect x="12" y="0" width="2.5" height="11" rx="1" fill="#1C1007"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Turn pantry odds into real meals.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="30" height="30" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#F97316" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-camera" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.997 4a2 2 0 0 1 1.76 1.05l.486.9A2 2 0 0 0 18.003 7H20a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h1.997a2 2 0 0 0 1.759-1.048l.489-.904A2 2 0 0 1 10.004 4z"/><circle cx="12" cy="13" r="3"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Point your camera at the fridge, pantry, or counter

children.name: div
children.textContent: Photo identifies ingredients, estimates freshness & flags what expires soon.

children.name: div
children.textContent: App builds meals around what you have, your time, and available equipment.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Cook once, eat twice — leftovers become tomorrow's lunch automatically.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Include expiry date stickers in your scan — Leftover Lens prioritizes meals around what spoils soonest to cut food waste.
